title: Opening for Medical Officer at Indraprastha Apollo Capital India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Medical Officer at Indraprastha Apollo Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Madurai operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Indraprastha Apollo Capital India:
Indraprastha Apollo Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Indraprastha Apollo Capital India!
